packs.name: Core Operating System
packs.description: The durable Zev workflow: owner buttons, Next protocol, ChatGPT usage routing, gear routing, git guard, handoffs, and systems health checks.
examplePrompts: Route this email draft to ChatGPT
Next
Create a goal: make this repo safe to deploy
Check the selected gear for debugging failing CI

packs.name: ChatGPT Saver Pack
packs.description: Preserves Codex usage by routing writing, brainstorming, strategy, summaries, learning, and second opinions to ChatGPT when no local repo execution is needed.
examplePrompts: Draft this client email in ChatGPT
Brainstorm 20 names without using Codex
Get a ChatGPT second opinion on this strategy

packs.name: Founder Operator Pack
packs.description: Turns scattered founder work into owner-only queues, handoffs, follow-ups, briefings, and crisp written outputs.
examplePrompts: Turn this messy project update into a client-ready status note
Extract owner buttons and next actions from this transcript
Create a handoff note for another Codex

packs.name: Builder Automation Pack
packs.description: For implementation work: feature building, CI/debugging, deploy prep, migrations, logs, reviews, and repo-safe shipping.
examplePrompts: Debug the failing build and commit the fix
Review the current diff for regressions
Ship this feature with tests and a clean changelog

packs.name: Design Delivery Pack
packs.description: For polished visual deliverables, frontend QA, brand consistency, image cleanup, and face-preserving design edits.
examplePrompts: Polish this dashboard for desktop and mobile
Create a static poster with visual QA
Preserve this face exactly while changing the surrounding design

packs.name: Knowledge Capture Pack
packs.description: Converts research, meetings, specs, and decisions into structured documents, Notion-ready pages, and implementation plans.
examplePrompts: Turn this conversation into a decision record
Convert this PRD into implementation tasks
Prepare a meeting brief from the available context

packs.name: Revenue and Ops Pack
packs.description: Sales, ads, leads, support, invoices, spreadsheets, and customer-facing operations.
examplePrompts: Find high-quality leads for this service
Organize these receipts into tax-ready folders
Write the spreadsheet formula and test edge cases

packs.name: XHigh Council Pack
packs.description: The highest-risk workflow: self-bounce, CEO/CTO/Programmer/QA council mode, and explicit guardrails before risky implementation.
examplePrompts: Use council mode to plan and implement this auth change
Bounce ideas before touching this database migration
Run xhigh review before production-risk deployment
